tests.name: core tables exist
tests.sql: select count(*)::text from information_schema.tables where table_name in ('persons','municipality_profile','audit_events','documents')

tests.name: lss domain tables exist
tests.sql: select count(*)::text from information_schema.tables where table_name in ('lss_decisions','assistance_providers','provider_invoices','lss_payments')

tests.name: economic assistance tables exist
tests.sql: select count(*)::text from information_schema.tables where table_name in ('ea_households','ea_decisions','ea_payments','ea_verified_income')

tests.name: ubm tables exist
tests.sql: select count(*)::text from information_schema.tables where table_name in ('ubm_requests','ubm_export_proposals','ubm_submissions','ubm_notifications')

tests.name: rls enabled on persons
tests.sql: select relrowsecurity::text from pg_class where relname = 'persons'

tests.name: rls enabled on ubm export proposals
tests.sql: select relrowsecurity::text from pg_class where relname = 'ubm_export_proposals'

tests.name: recurring 2029 phase is disabled by default
tests.sql: select enabled::text from ubm_phase_configurations where phase_key = 'phase_2_recurring_2029'

tests.name: audit events are append-only
tests.sql: select tgname from pg_trigger where tgname = 'audit_events_no_update'

tests.name: maker-checker trigger installed
tests.sql: select tgname from pg_trigger where tgname = 'approval_steps_maker_checker'
